name: Aberdeen Pickleball
description: Aberdeen Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Valparaiso, IN. There are 4 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include wheelchair accessibility, food, restrooms, and water. The courts are private.

name: Bicentennial Park
description: Bicentennial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Valparaiso, IN. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Chesterton Park
description: Chesterton Park is a place to play pickleball in Chesterton, IN. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Jessee-Pifer Park
description: Jessee-Pifer Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Valparaiso, IN. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Portage YMCA
description: Portage YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Portage, IN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: The Courts Of Northwest Indiana
description: The Courts Of Northwest Indiana is a place to play pickleball in Valparaiso, IN. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Tower Park

description: Come play pickleball at Valparaiso YMCA in Valparaiso, IN! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
